metadata.description: Yarrasys agent skills, also distributed as Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: kdbx
plugins.description: KeePassXC credentials manager: per-project/per-env secrets in key-file-only .kdbx vaults, with an enforced agent/human role-guard hook and safe MCP tools.

plugins.name: deepseek
plugins.description: Offload simple, mechanical dev tasks to a nested headless claude on DeepSeek's endpoint, with an enforced autonomy-guard hook and /deepseek:* commands.
